briefdescription.para: Devicetree setup for the MRAM power enable pin.
Power on delay.
The device ID.

detaileddescription.para: Variable to hold the content of the status register Bit 7: WPEN, R/W, HW Based Protect Bit, 1:P. Enabled, 0:P. Disabled Bit 6: SNPEN, R/W, SerialNr Protect Bit, 1:Wr protected, 0;Writable Bit 5: TB, R/W, Top/Bottom Memory Array Protect Selection, 1: Bottom P. Enabled, 0: Top P. Enabled Bit 4: BP[2], R/W, Block Protection Bit 2 Bit 3: BP[1], R/W, Block Protection Bit 1 Bit 2: BP[0], R/W, Block Protection Bit 0 Bit 1: WREN, R, Write Protection Enable, 1:Disabled, 0:Enabled Bit 0: RSVD, R, Reserved for future use

Variable to hold the content of the configuration register 1 Bit 7: RSVD, R/W, Reserved for future use Bit 6: RSVD, R/W, Reserved for future use Bit 5: RSVD, R/W, Reserved for future use Bit 4: RSVD, R/W, Reserved for future use Bit 3: RSVD, R/W, Reserved for future use Bit 2: MAPLK, R/W, Status Register TB, BP[2:0] Protect, 1: Lock TB and BP[2:0], 0: Unlock TB and BP[2:0] Bit 1: RSVD, R/W, Reserved for future use Bit 0: ASPLK, R/W, Augmented 256-Byte Area Data Protection, 1: Write Protection for Augmented Area Data regardless of ASP[7:0], 0: Write Protection for Augmented Area Data depending on ASP[7:0]

briefdescription.para: SPI controller device.
SPI controller configuration.
Command to write the status register.
Command to write a memory array.
Command to read memory area.
Command to read the status register.
Write enable command.
Command to read configuration register 1.
Command to read any register, address based.
Command to write any register, address based.
Command to read the device ID.
Command to enter deep power down mode.
Command to exit deep power down mode.
SPI MRAM class destructor.

detaileddescription.para: The destructor is never called and is implemented only for completion reasons. It simply triggers a debug message on info debug level.

briefdescription.para: Function to retrieve MRAM device ID.

detaileddescription.para:
returns return pointer to the device ID, NULL otherwise
Function switch on MRAM power supply by calling member function power_on. In case of an error function returns error code NULL, otherwise it read the device ID by call of member function read_device_id and switch off MRAM power supply by calling member function power_off. In case of an error function returns with error code NULL, otherwise the read device ID in member variable id will be returned.

briefdescription.para: Function to retrieve MRAM status register content.

detaileddescription.para:
returns return 0 on success, otherwise error code -1
Function switch on MRAM power supply by calling member function power_on. In case of an error function returns with error code -1, otherwise it read the status register by call of member function read_status_reg and switch off MRAM power supply by calling member function power_off. In case of an error function returns with error code -1, otherwise the read content of the status register in member variable status_reg will be returned.

briefdescription.para: Function to retrieve MRAM configuration register 1 content.

detaileddescription.para:
returns return 0 on success, otherwise error code -1
Function switch on MRAM power supply by calling member function power_on. In case of an error function returns with error code -1, otherwise it read the configuration register 1 by call of member function read_config1_reg and switch off MRAM power supply by calling member function power_off. In case of an error function returns with error code -1, otherwise the read content of the configuration register 1 in member variable config1_reg will be returned.

briefdescription.para: Function to erase the content of the MRAM.

detaileddescription.para: Function initialize an array of size 256 Byte with 0xFF and write this array in a loop into MRAM by calling member function writeBytes until the complete memory has been written. In case of an error the loop will be interrupted and the function returns.

briefdescription.para: Function to erase content of the MRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
from
Start address for erase operation
len
Number of bytesd to be erased
Function initialize an array of size 256 Byte with 0xFF and write this array in a loop into MRAM by calling member function writeBytes until the complete memory from address from up to address from + len has been written. In case of an error the loop will be interrupted and the function returns.

briefdescription.para: Function to print the content of the MRAM in a terminal.

detaileddescription.para:
from
Start point of data to be printed
len
Length (number of bytes) of data to be printed
Function read blockwise bytes in a loop from start point until end point (from + len) by calling function readBytes. In case of an error the loop will be terminated, otherwise the read data will be printed out by call of macro LOG_HEXDUMP_INF.

briefdescription.para: Function to write multiple bytes into MRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
addr
Startaddress for writing the data in MRAM
data
Pointer to array with the data to be written
num_bytes
Number of bytes to be written
returns return value of method write_bytes (0 no error, otherwise error code)
Function writes num_bytes from array data into MRAM starting at address addr by calling private method write_bytes.

briefdescription.para: Function to read multiple bytes from MRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
addr
Startaddress for reading the data from MRAM
data
Pointer to array for the data to be read
num_bytes
Number of bytes to be read
returns return value of method read_bytes (0 no error, otherwise error code)
Function read num_bytes into array data from MRAM starting at address addr by calling private method read_bytes.

briefdescription.para: Function to enter deep power down mode of MRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
returns return value of method enter_deep_power_down (0 no error, otherwise error code)
Function

Function switch on MRAM power supply by calling member function power_on. In case of an error function returns with error code , otherwise it enters deep power down mode by calling private method dpd_enter and switch off MRAM power supply by calling member function power_off. The function returns the return value of method enter_deep_power_down (0 no error, otherwise error code)

briefdescription.para: Function to leave deep power down mode of MRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
returns return value of method exit_deep_power_down (0 no error, otherwise error code)
Function

Function switch on MRAM power supply by calling member function power_on. In case of an error function returns with error code , otherwise it enters deep power down mode by calling private method dpd_enter and switch off MRAM power supply by calling member function power_off. The function returns the return value of method exit_deep_power_down (0 no error, otherwise error code)

briefdescription.para: Setter function to set the power on delay.

detaileddescription.para: The function assign the parameter usec to the private member variable power_delay_usec.

briefdescription.para: The initialization function of the SPI MRAM class.

detaileddescription.para: The function initialize the value for status register with 0x40 (Serial Number Write protected) and for the configuration register 1 with 0x01 (Unlock TB and BP[2:0], Write Protection for Augmented Area Data) and the private member variables spi_dev (SPI controller device) and spi_cfg (SPI controller configuration) by calling the functions getController and getConfig of the spibus instance spibus::inst(). Afterwards if wake up the MRAM by calling member function wakeup, read device id, status register and configuration register 1 by vall of the member functions getDeviceId, getStatusRegVal and getConfig1RegVal. If status register has not value 0x40, configuration register 1 and status register will be read by calling the member functions write_config1_reg and write_status_reg and status register will be read again by call of function getStatusRegVal. Finally device ID and content of status register will be checked. If davice ID is not 0xD9010501 or status register has not value 0x40, an exception will be raised with call of macro __ASSERT_NO_MSG.

briefdescription.para: Function to switch on MRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
returns 0 on success, error code otherwise
The method calls function gpio_pin_set_dt provided by zephyr GPIO library to initialize private member variable power_gpio of type struct gpio_dt_spec. In case function returns an error the method returns the error code immediately, otherwise method performs a delay to prevent abnormal read/write operations(see MRAM data sheet, page 9) and returns 0.

briefdescription.para: Function to switch off MRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
returns 0 on success, error code otherwise
The method calls function gpio_pin_set_dt provided by zephyr GPIO library to initialize private member variable power_gpio of type struct gpio_dt_spec. In case function returns an error the method returns the error code immediately, otherwise it returns 0.

briefdescription.para: The inst function to retrieve the exclusiv only instance of the class.

detaileddescription.para:
Returns a pointer to the class instance
In case there is no instance created, the constructor will be called to create the instance. Finally a pointer to the instance is returned.

briefdescription.para: SPI MRAM class constructor.

detaileddescription.para: The constructor is declared as private according to singleton pattern. It is called in the static inst function to create the exclusiv only instance of the class. It initializes the power delay and configures the power gpio for MRAM activity.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *spi, struct spi_config *spi_cfg, uint8_t cmd)
memberdef.name: send_command

briefdescription.para: Function to send a command to MRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
spi
Pointer to the SPI device node identifier of type struct device
spi_cfg
Pointer to the SPI controller configuration structure of type struct spi_config
cmd
the command to be send
returns The return code of function spi_write (0 no error, otherwise error code)
Function initializes transmit buffer with the OP code command cmd and call function spi_write. Finally the return value of spi_write will be returned to the calling function.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *spi, struct spi_config *spi_cfg, uint8_t cmd, uint32_t addr, uint8_t *data, size_t len, bool is_write)
memberdef.name: mram_access

briefdescription.para: Function to access MRAM for reading and writing.

detaileddescription.para:
spi
Pointer to the SPI device node identifier of type struct device
spi_cfg
Pointer to the SPI controller configuration structure of type struct spi_config
cmd
OP code command
addr
Startaddress for reading or writing the data from / in FRAM
data
Pointer to array for the data to be read or to be written
len
Number of bytes to be read or to be written
is_write
Flag to specify read / write direction
returns return value of method spi_transceive in case of reading or of method spi_write in case of writing (0 no error, otherwise error code)
Function initializes transmit buffer and set the OP code command cmd and start address in array access. In case of reading the receive buffer is initialized and read the data by calling function spi_transceive. In case of writing the data will be written by calling function spi_write. Finally the return value of function spi_transceive or spi_write will be returned to calling function. See MRAM data sheet, page 12ff.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *spi, struct spi_config *spi_cfg, uint8_t *id_buf, size_t len)
memberdef.name: read_device_id

briefdescription.para: Function to read the device ID from MRAM.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the SPI device node identifier of type struct device
Pointer to the SPI controller configuration structure of type struct spi_config

detaileddescription.para:
returns return value of method spi_transceive (0 no error, otherwise error code)
Function initializes transmit and receive buffer, set the read Device ID OP code command CMD_RDID and read the device ID by calling function spi_transceive. See MRAM data sheet, page 12ff for OP code commands and page 22 for device ID.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *spi, struct spi_config *spi_cfg, uint32_t addr, uint8_t *data, size_t len)
memberdef.name: read_bytes

briefdescription.para: Function to read multiple bytes to MRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
spi
Pointer to the SPI device node identifier of type struct device
spi_cfg
Pointer to the SPI controller configuration structure of type struct spi_config
addr
Startaddress for reading the data from MRAM
data
Pointer to array for the data to be read
len
Number of bytes to be read
returns return 0 on success, otherwise error code
Function read the data calling function mram_access with OP code command CMD_READ. In case of an error function returns error code, otherwise returns 0 for success indication. See MB85RS4MTY data sheet, page 12ff.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *spi, struct spi_config *spi_cfg, uint32_t addr, const uint8_t *data, size_t len)
memberdef.name: write_bytes

briefdescription.para: Function to write multiple bytes to MRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
spi
Pointer to the SPI device node identifier of type struct device
spi_cfg
Pointer to the SPI controller configuration structure of type struct spi_config
addr
Startaddress for writing the data in MRAM
data
Pointer to array for the data to be written
len
Number of bytes to be written
returns return 0 on success, otherwise error code
Function enable writing by calling function send_command with OP code command CMD_WREN. In case of an error function returns immediately with error code, otherwise the data will be written by calling function mram_access with OP code command CMD_WRTE. In case of an error function returns error code, otherwise returns 0 for indication success. See MRAM data sheet, page 12ff.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *spi, struct spi_config *spi_cfg, const uint8_t *data)
memberdef.name: write_status_reg

briefdescription.para: Function to write MRAM status register.

detaileddescription.para:
spi
Pointer to the SPI device node identifier of type struct device
spi_cfg
Pointer to the SPI controller configuration structure of type struct spi_config
data
Pointer to data array to be written
returns return 0 on success, otherwise error code
Function switch on MRAM power supply by calling member function power_on. In case of an error function returns with error code, otherwise it enable writing by calling function send_command with OP code command CMD_WREN. In case of an error function returns immediately with error code, otherwise the status register will be written by calling function mram_access with OP code command CMD_WRAR. In case of an error function returns error code, otherwise returns 0 for indication success. See MRAM data sheet, page 12ff.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *spi, struct spi_config *spi_cfg, const uint8_t *data)
memberdef.name: write_config1_reg

briefdescription.para: Function to write MRAM configuration register 1.

detaileddescription.para:
spi
Pointer to the SPI device node identifier of type struct device
spi_cfg
Pointer to the SPI controller configuration structure of type struct spi_config
data
Pointer to data array to be written
returns return 0 on success, otherwise error code
Function switch on MRAM power supply by calling member function power_on. In case of an error function returns with error code, otherwise it enable writing by calling function send_command with OP code command CMD_WREN. In case of an error function returns immediately with error code, otherwise the configuration register 1 will be written by calling function mram_access with OP code command CMD_WRAR. In case of an error function returns error code, otherwise returns 0 for indication success. See MRAM data sheet, page 12ff.

briefdescription.para: Function to enter deep power down mode of MRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
spi
Pointer to the SPI device node identifier of type struct device
spi_cfg
Pointer to the SPI controller configuration structure of type struct spi_config
returns return code of function send_command
The function send the command CMD_DPD_ENTER to enter deep power down mode to MRAM by calling member function send_command.

briefdescription.para: Function to exit deep power down mode of MRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
spi
Pointer to the SPI device node identifier of type struct device
spi_cfg
Pointer to the SPI controller configuration structure of type struct spi_config
returns return code of function send_command
The function send the command CMD_DPD_EXIT to exit deep power down mode to MRAM by calling member function send_command.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *spi, struct spi_config *spi_cfg, uint8_t *id_buf, size_t len)
memberdef.name: read_status_reg

briefdescription.para: Function to read MRAM status register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the SPI device node identifier of type struct device
Pointer to the SPI controller configuration structure of type struct spi_config

detaileddescription.para:
returns return 0 on success, otherwise error code
Function initializes transmit and receive buffer, set the read read status register ID OP code command CMD_RDSR and read the status register by calling function spi_transceive. See MRAM data sheet, page 12ff for OP code commands and page 15 for status register.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *spi, struct spi_config *spi_cfg, uint8_t *id_buf, size_t len)
memberdef.name: read_config1_reg

briefdescription.para: Function to read MRAM configuration register 1.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the SPI device node identifier of type struct device
Pointer to the SPI controller configuration structure of type struct spi_config

detaileddescription.para:
returns return 0 on success, otherwise error code
Function initializes transmit and receive buffer, set the read read configuration register 1 ID OP code command CMD_RDC1 and read the configuration register 1 by calling function spi_transceive. See MRAM data sheet, page 12ff for OP code commands and page 17 for configuration register 1.

briefdescription.para: SPI MRAM class implemented according to C++ singleton design pattern.

simplesect.title: Detailed Description
simplesect.para: The SPI MRAM class handle the storage of the acceleration raw data in MRAM. It provides methods to initialize and erase MRAM, to read and write the data, to push MRAM into power saving mode or release from it, to dump the data and to read and ship the devcie ID.

xrefdescription.para: May we need to implement also a selftest function if provided from maufacturer!! Furthermore it provides a private method to test the integrity of the FRAM at startup of the system.
